mcqs.question: Which Faculty and University issued these provisional results?
options: A) Faculty of Engineering, University of Moratuwa
B) Faculty of Information Technology, University of Moratuwa, Sri Lanka
C) Faculty of Science, University of Colombo
D) Faculty of IT, University of Sri Jayewardenepura
mcqs.answer: B) Faculty of Information Technology, University of Moratuwa, Sri Lanka

mcqs.question: What grade did student 245514J receive for CM1310?
How many students received an 'A+' grade in CM1310?
According to the provided context, what is the status of the results for Intake 2024 - Semester 2?
options: A) Final results, confirmed by the Senate
B) Provisional results, subject to confirmation by the senate
C) Provisional results, awaiting faculty approval
D) Final results, issued by LearnOrg
mcqs.answer: B) Provisional results, subject to confirmation by the senate
